evals.name: first-time-setup
evals.prompt: I just installed railway-cli. I have two Railway accounts - one personal and one for my client project. Help me set this up so I can use both without having to log in and out via the browser each time.
evals.expected_output: Should guide through creating config, adding both accounts with tokens, mapping projects, and verifying tokens work. Should NOT suggest browser login.

evals.name: deploy-auth-error
evals.prompt: Deploy this project to railway. I'm getting auth errors when I try to deploy, I think I'm using the wrong account. My project is in /home/user/Projects/ClientApp.
evals.expected_output: Should check which account is mapped to the directory, verify with railway whoami, help switch to the correct account, then deploy with the right token.

evals.name: debug-502
evals.prompt: My railway deployment is crashing. The API was working yesterday but now returns 502. Help me figure out what's wrong.
evals.expected_output: Should follow a systematic debugging flow: check status, check runtime logs, check build logs, check variables, suggest common causes. Should use the right token for the current directory.
